hero.sub: Pamoja Pay brings your savings, loans, expenses, and governance into one modern platform. Members get a self-service portal. Managers get real-time control.

features.title: Member Management
features.desc: Complete digital profiles with photo, ID, address and next of kin.

features.title: Savings Tracking
features.desc: All contribution categories tracked separately with real-time balances.

features.title: Loan Management
features.desc: Full loan lifecycle from application through approval to final settlement.

features.title: Repayment Schedules
features.desc: Auto-generated, color-coded schedules shareable via WhatsApp or PDF.

features.title: Overdue & Penalties
features.desc: Overdue loans tracked with penalty application and NPL classification.

features.title: Expense Tracking
features.desc: Record, approve, and monitor all SACCO expenses and service providers.

features.title: Investments
features.desc: Track SACCO investments and distribute returns to members at year-end.

features.title: Voting & Elections
features.desc: Secure, anonymous digital polls for board elections and resolutions.

features.title: Benevolent Fund
features.desc: Next of kin records, eligibility tracking, and automated payout calculation.

features.title: Document Storage
features.desc: Central cloud repository for minutes, AGM docs, and member documents.

features.title: Audit Trail
features.desc: Immutable record of every action — who did what, when, from which device.

features.title: Communications
features.desc: Automated Email, SMS, and WhatsApp reminders for your members.

features.title: Offline Mode
features.desc: Staff keep working without internet. Changes sync when back online.

features.title: PDF Reports
features.desc: Statements, loan agreements, receipts, and AGM reports on demand.

features.title: Member Portal
features.desc: Members log in securely to view balances, apply for loans, and vote.

features.title: Auditor Hub
features.desc: Dedicated auditor dashboard with full oversight and approval tools.

digital_rent_note: 400+ members? Switch to Digital Rent — UGX 2,000 per member per month. Scales as your SACCO grows.

testimonials.name: Margaret Kizza
testimonials.quote: Manual reconciliations used to take our treasurer every Saturday. Now it is done in under 30 minutes. Our members love the self-service portal.

testimonials.name: Robert Ocen
testimonials.quote: Automated reminders before due dates changed everything. Members pay on time and our loan book is healthier than it has ever been.

testimonials.name: Aisha Namutebi
testimonials.quote: Our AGM was completely paperless. Reports, digital voting, real-time audit access — everything our auditor needed was right there.

faq.a: Pamoja Pay is a complete SACCO management platform built for cooperative societies in Uganda and Africa.
A flat monthly subscription based on your member count. A one-time setup fee covers data migration and staff training.
Month-to-month with no long-term commitment. Cancel anytime. 30-day money-back guarantee.

faq.q: Can members access from their phones?
faq.a: Yes. The member portal works on any smartphone browser with no app download needed.

faq.q: What happens when internet goes down?
faq.a: Pamoja Pay works fully offline. Staff continue working and changes sync when connectivity returns.
Yes. Bank-level encryption, row-level security, daily backups, and an immutable audit trail.

faq.q: Can we upgrade our plan later?
faq.a: Anytime. Your data stays intact and you simply unlock new features.

about.mission: Our mission: To digitize and empower cooperative societies across Uganda and Africa.
about.p1: "Pamoja" means "Together" in Swahili — and that spirit of togetherness is at the heart of every cooperative. SACCOs exist because people come together to pool resources, support each other, and build collective wealth.
about.p2: We built Pamoja Pay because we saw too many SACCOs across Uganda and Africa struggling with paper records, spreadsheets, and systems not built for the cooperative context.

seo.title: PamojaPay - SACCO Digitalization Solution
seo.description: Complete SACCO management platform for Uganda and Africa. Member portal, loan management, savings tracking, and more.
seo.keywords: SACCO, cooperative, savings, loans, Uganda, Africa, digitalization
